title: No var declarations
guideline: Use const (or let when reassignment is required); var is forbidden.

rule.message: var is forbidden; use const or let

title: No console.* in application code
guideline: Use the shared logger module instead of console.*.

rule.message: console.* is forbidden; use the logger module

title: No explicit any
guideline: Type everything explicitly; use unknown + narrowing instead of any.

rule.message: explicit any is forbidden; use unknown or a precise type

title: No @ts-ignore
guideline: Never silence the type checker with @ts-ignore; fix the type or use @ts-expect-error with a reason.

rule.message: @ts-ignore is forbidden; fix the type error properly

title: Functions are camelCase
Result union for fallible operations
guideline: Fallible functions return a discriminated Result union instead of throwing.

title: Interfaces are PascalCase
guideline: Interface names use PascalCase without an I- prefix.
